content:
Six intrepid ESC members packed their bags and flew up to Yellowknife this past weekend. Along for the trek were Ibrahim Elserafy, his son Mohammed, Molli Hay, Jorge Quintero, Andrew Loden and Duncan Lee. Our team highlight of the tournament was Molli defeating former world #171 Jamie Laird in an exhibition match.

It was a great time up north, and it’s a tournament that everyone should check out at least once! Thanks to the Yellowknife racket club for hosting https://ykracquetclub.com/!
